creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
Try including: device sbmidi0  at isa? port 0x330

or use the pcm drivers (remove controller snd0 and device sb*) and add:

device pcm0 at isa? port ? tty irq 5 drq 1 flags 0x15

-----
